sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49483" key="qureatikoi\" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θυρεᾱτικοὶ</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στέφανοι</foreign> wreaths <sense id="n49483.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">worn to commemorate the victory at Thyrea</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1685.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sosib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
